core_mechanism: a coupled latent-state state-space dynamical system, in which external inputs drive a chain of coupled internal state-transition maps that produce observable outputs, with convergence and robustness certified via contraction and input-to-state stability of the state dynamics
brief_reason: The abstract proposes a modular state-space model whose coupled mappings link inputs to outputs through latent internal states and for which it establishes boundedness, forward invariance, contraction under constant input, and input-to-state stability.
